title: Guinea Pig Variety
description: This mod adds 9 different guinea pigs to the game!
body:
Are you looking for a way to add guinea pigs to Minecraft? Well, you found it!

This mod adds 9 guinea pig variants to the game:

- Black
- White
- Gray
- Red
- Black Dutch
- Brown & White
- Himalayan
- Black & Tan
- Tricolor

 
Guinea pigs spawn in forest biomes.
They are tamable with dandelions and can be bred with dandelions, grass, carrots and apples (also with the golden variants)..
Guinea pigs are always hungry, so they squeek and will follow you when you are nearby with one of their favorite foods.

 

Guinea pigs drop fertilizer every once in a while, just like chickens lay eggs. If you own guinea pigs you know how much of it they drop;)
You can use the fertilizer just like bonemeal.
Tamed guinea pigs can sit, follow (green particles spawn) or wander (smoke particles spawn) by right clicking them.
